heading: Penalty for unlawful production or removal of beer
label: 5674 Penalty for unlawful production or removal of beer
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5674, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 696Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1978— substituted “production or removal” for “removal” in section catchline, redesignated existing provision as subsec. (b), and added subsec. (a).Pub. L. 95–458

amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5674, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 696Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1978— substituted “production or removal” for “removal” in section catchline, redesignated existing provision as subsec. (b), and added subsec. (a).Pub. L. 95–458

Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first calendar month beginning more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–458section 2(c) of Pub. L. 95–458section 5042 of this titleOct. 14, 1978

children.heading: Unlawful production
children.label: a Unlawful production
children.text: Any person who brews beer or produces beer shall be fined not more than $1,000, or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both, unless such beer is brewed or produced in a brewery qualified under subchapter G or such production is exempt from tax under section 5053(e) (relating to beer for personal or family use).

children.heading: Unlawful removal
children.label: b Unlawful removal
children.text: Any brewer or other person who removes or in any way aids in the removal from any brewery of beer without complying with the provisions of this chapter or regulations issued pursuant thereto shall be fined not more than $1,000, or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both.
